privileged_info_summary: The task is instantiate_project_from_template@1, which operates on synthetic data created during environment setup. The source template is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Standard-Project-Template and contains three required child folders: 01-Planning, 02-Financials, and 03-Legal. The template also includes a Project-Checklist file in the 01-Planning folder. The target workspace should be created at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Phoenix with title 'Project Phoenix' and must contain the same folder structure as the source template.
